findings.summary: After multiple Tabs, focus reached an interactive control (How it works) with a computed 3px outline, but settled screenshots did not show a clearly visible focus ring on primary nav or that control—keyboard focus is not reliably perceivable in the UI.
findings.evidence: activeElement text=How it works, outline=oklch(0.55 0.06 195) solid 3px; screenshots 02/03 readback show no obvious focus ring

findings.summary: Header chips Assistant status: Ready and Identity status: Verified appear as button-like controls alongside Search and Sign out, without a clear status-vs-action distinction; Ready/Verified can over-promise readiness relative to body copy that separates identity, store connection, and authority.
findings.evidence: dashboard page_context buttons include those labels; screenshot 01 chrome + body disclaimer

findings.summary: Samantha FAB plus Assistant status chrome present two assistant entry/status cues on Dashboard while authority is deferred to Assistant permissions; purpose/boundary was not confirmed because that surface and a harmless Samantha open were not completed before signed-in session ended.
findings.evidence: screenshot 01 FAB + status chip; nav link Assistant permissions present; Orders/Settings/AgentGuard not reviewed signed-in

findings.summary: Catalog exposes H2s Review published listings and Update products in one table while empty inventory still offers Add first product—wording implies existing listings/table edits when count is zero (observed via page_context only).
findings.evidence: Catalog page_context headings after mouse nav; no Catalog screenshot retained

findings.summary: Signed-in review aborted after accidental Sign out; landing required Sign in and re-auth was forbidden, so keyboard Enter-activate of primary nav, Orders, Assistant permissions, Settings, and Samantha purpose check remain untested.
findings.evidence: final_url http://127.0.0.1:43103/ buttons Sign in / Sign in to Seller workspace; navigate to /dashboard stayed signed out

screenshots.readback: Signed-in Seller dashboard: ONDC Seller brand, nav (Assistant permissions/Dashboard/Catalog/Orders/Settings), Search + Assistant status Ready + Identity status Verified + Sign out visible; H1 Seller dashboard; products/categories 0; identity Verified with identity≠store≠authority disclaimer; empty Inventory snapshot with Add first product; Samantha FAB bottom-right; How it works bottom-left.
Post-Tab settle on dashboard; same layout; Hermes cursor/tooltip near Dashboard; no clearly visible keyboard focus ring on nav or bottom controls in image readback despite Tab sequence.
Further Tab settle; activeElement was How it works with computed outline, but screenshot readback still lacks an obvious focus ring; Sign out and Samantha remain visible.

confirmed: Started signed-in at /dashboard with Sign out visible
Primary nav labels and H1/H2 hierarchy readable on Dashboard
Empty inventory state and Add first product CTA understandable
Catalog route reachable (mouse) with Product catalog H1
Tab moves focus among interactive controls
Hermes lease closed; sessions inventory empty (seller-ux-half-1784479779 absent); probe active_agent_sessions=0
